'''falacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadwork|beadwork]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadwork|beadwork]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| falacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fælæchæth|fælæchæth]] || [[word:fælæchæj|fælæchæj]] || [[word:fælæchæsh|fælæchæsh]] || [[word:fælæchæ|fælæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:falalachath|falalachath]] || [[word:falalachaj|falalachaj]] || [[word:falalachash|falalachash]] || [[word:falalacha|falalacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:falachath|falachath]] || [[word:falachaj|falachaj]] || [[word:falachash|falachash]] || [[word:falacha|falacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:falafchath|falafchath]] || [[word:falafchaj|falafchaj]] || [[word:falafchash|falafchash]] || [[word:falafchaf|falafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:falachatha|falachatha]] || [[word:falachaja|falachaja]] || [[word:falachasha|falachasha]] || [[word:falachaka|falachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:falachath|falachath]] || [[word:falachaj|falachaj]] || [[word:falachash|falachash]] || [[word:falacha|falacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:falachathal|falachathal]] || [[word:falachajal|falachajal]] || [[word:falachashal|falachashal]] || [[word:falachakal|falachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:falachathatha|falachathatha]] || [[word:falachajaja|falachajaja]] || [[word:falachashasha|falachashasha]] || [[word:falachaka|falachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:falachathan|falachathan]] || [[word:falachajan|falachajan]] || [[word:falachashan|falachashan]] || [[word:falachakan|falachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:falachathaoro|falachathaoro]] || [[word:falachajaoro|falachajaoro]] || [[word:falachashaoro|falachashaoro]] || [[word:falachakaoro|falachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
